name: German Chocolate Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Graham cracker or 1 package of chocolate-crumb crust mix (store-bought)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and stir in 2 tablespoons of milk until smooth.
2. In a separate bowl, beat sugar into cream cheese.
3. Add remaining milk and melted chocolate mixture to the cream cheese.
4. Mix in Cool Whip gently until blended smoothly.
5. Spoon filling into crust.
6. Cover with protective cover and freeze until firm, about 4 hours.
7. Remove from freezer and let stand at room temperature for about 1 hour before serving.
8. Store any leftover pie in the refrigerator or freezer.
Source: N.McDiarmid
== Courtesy of Dale & Gail Shipp, Columbia Md. =
